steps.title: Find the difference
steps.content: The student wants a difference between Ur and Euramerica. The notes give one clear contrast: Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago, while Euramerica formed about 300 million years ago.

steps.title: Reject noncomparisons
steps.content: Choice B defines supercontinents in general. Choice C emphasizes what Ur and Euramerica have in common. Choice D mentions only Ur, so it cannot compare the two supercontinents. The answer is A.
